summary: DHH shares his younger brother's updated photography site featuring aggressive inline skating shots from 2004. He praises the sharpness and quality achieved with a consumer-grade Canon S50 camera. He also mentions his brother's upcoming transition to video recording with a new 3CCD Canon camera, and notes that a previous two-minute skate clip may be aired on Danish television.
key_points: DHH's brother updated his Stolen Moments photography site with new inline skating action shots
The photos demonstrate impressive quality from a consumer Canon S50 camera
A previous skate video has potential to be broadcast on TV2's gadget show
money_quotes: It's quite amazing how precisely and sharp the speed on inline skating is captured with his consumer Canon S50.
key_insight: A brief personal post sharing pride in his brother's action photography and videography work in the inline skating scene.
